<!-- DO NOT EDIT — this file is generated by scripts/docs/gen_cli_status.py. Regenerate with `make docs-gen-cli`. -->

SentinelQA's CLI surface is defined in PRD §13.1 and stays the same across phases — commands are registered at all times so `sentinel --help` always lists the full contract. The **Status** column below is sourced from `plans/STATUS.md` and updates as phases land.

All commands honor the global flags in PRD §13.3: `--config`, `--json`, `--verbose`, `--quiet`, `--ci`, `--url`, `--output`, `--fail-under`, `--dry-run`. Exit codes follow the canonical grid in [Error codes](/errors/).

## Command status

| Command | Status | Phase | Description |
|---|---|---:|---|
| `sentinel init` | `Stable` | 02 | Initialize a new SentinelQA project |
| `sentinel doctor` | `Stable` | 02 | Diagnose the local environment |
| `sentinel discover` | `Stable` | 05 | Crawl + map the target app |
| `sentinel plan` | `Stable` | 06 | Generate a deterministic test plan |
| `sentinel generate` | `Stable` | 07 | Generate Playwright specs from a plan |
| `sentinel test` | `Stable` | 08 | Run generated/user specs (raw runner) |
| `sentinel audit` | `Stable` | 02 | End-to-end audit (discovery → planner → … → reports) |
| `sentinel functional` | `Stable` | 10 | Run functional-module specs only |
| `sentinel a11y` | `Stable` | 11 | Run accessibility-module checks |
| `sentinel perf` | `Stable` | 12 | Run performance-module checks |
| `sentinel security` | `Stable` | 13 | Run safe-security-module checks |
| `sentinel api` | `Stable` | 22 | Run API contract / negative / auth / pagination |
| `sentinel visual` | `Stable` | 21 | Visual regression: diff / accept / capture |
| `sentinel chaos` | `Stable` | 23 | Bounded adversarial scenarios |
| `sentinel llm-audit` | `Stable` | 19 | LLM-Code anti-pattern detectors |
| `sentinel fix` | `Stable` | 20 | Healer / self-repair proposals |
| `sentinel ci` | `Stable` | 17 | CI-mode dispatch with diff-aware selection |
| `sentinel report` | `Stable` | 15 | Re-render reports for a prior run |
| `sentinel plugins` | `Stable` | 24 | List / inspect / validate installed plugins |
| `sentinel mcp` | `Stable` | 18 | Run the MCP server (stdio default) |

## Command reference

### `sentinel init` {#sentinel-init}

Idempotent project initializer. Writes `sentinel.config.yaml`, the bundled GitHub workflow under `.github/workflows/sentinel.yml`, and an empty `.sentinel/` artifact directory. `--force` overwrites existing files.

### `sentinel doctor` {#sentinel-doctor}

Validates Python / Node / Playwright / config / safety / reachability / env / `.sentinel` writable / disk. ASCII or single-line JSON output. See [Doctor reference](/get-started/doctor/).

### `sentinel discover` {#sentinel-discover}

HTTP-first crawler with optional Playwright backend. Writes `discovery.json` + `forms.json` + `api.json` + `auth.json` + `risk.json` + `discovery.report.md`. See [Discovery module](/modules/discovery/).

### `sentinel plan` {#sentinel-plan}

Deterministic-first planner with optional LLM adapter. Writes `plan.json` (byte-stable) + `plan.md`. See [Planner](/modules/planner/).

### `sentinel generate` {#sentinel-generate}

Jinja2-driven Playwright spec generator with semantic locators. Banner-protected against hand edits. See [Generator](/modules/generator/).

### `sentinel test` {#sentinel-test}

Direct dispatch to the local or Docker runner. Sharding, retries, quarantine. See [Runner](/modules/runner/).

### `sentinel audit` {#sentinel-audit}

Drives the canonical 17-step run lifecycle end-to-end across every enabled module. The default entry point for CI.

### `sentinel functional` {#sentinel-functional}

Walks `tests/sentinel/` for `*.spec.ts`, drives the runner, translates failed executions into findings. See [Functional](/modules/functional/).

### `sentinel a11y` {#sentinel-a11y}

Per-route axe-core + keyboard / landmark / sr-name checks. Always phrases findings as "Automated accessibility check…". See [Accessibility](/modules/accessibility/).

### `sentinel perf` {#sentinel-perf}

Synthetic page / API / CPU / leak budgets. Always labels findings synthetic. See [Performance](/modules/performance/).

### `sentinel security` {#sentinel-security}

Safe-by-default HTTP checks; gated destructive probes; dep + SAST adapters. See [Security](/modules/security/).

### `sentinel api` {#sentinel-api}

OpenAPI / GraphQL contract, negative cases, auth matrix, pagination, error-shape, backward-compat. See [API](/modules/api/).

### `sentinel visual` {#sentinel-visual}

Pillow diff with SSIM filter. Hard CI-acceptance guard. See [Visual](/modules/visual/).

### `sentinel chaos` {#sentinel-chaos}

Bounded Playwright-injected scenarios. See [Chaos](/modules/chaos/).

### `sentinel llm-audit` {#sentinel-llm-audit}

Sixteen detectors for LLM-generated app anti-patterns. See [LLM-Code Audit](/modules/llm-audit/).

### `sentinel fix` {#sentinel-fix}

Locator / wait / fixture repair proposals. Banner-aware apply, assertion-weakening guard. See [Healer](/modules/healer/).

### `sentinel ci` {#sentinel-ci}

Resolves PRD §21.3 presets (`fast` / `standard` / `full` / `nightly` / `release`); diff-aware selection. See [CI/CD](/cicd/).

### `sentinel report` {#sentinel-report}

Re-renders persisted artifacts to `html` / `json` / `sarif` / `junit` / `md`. Idempotent. `--explain-score` prints the score derivation.

### `sentinel plugins` {#sentinel-plugins}

Lists / inspects / validates installed plugins. See [Plugins](/plugins/).

### `sentinel mcp` {#sentinel-mcp}

Runs the MCP server (NDJSON-framed JSON-RPC over stdio, or loopback-only HTTP). Twelve `sentinel.*` tools. See [MCP](/mcp/).
